name: Postcards experiences starter list
note: V0 seed; a community-maintained dataset can replace this file later. Same shape, same ids.

experiences.name: See the northern lights
experiences.hint: Aurora borealis; far northern latitudes in winter

experiences.name: Experience the midnight sun
experiences.hint: Sun above the horizon at midnight; polar summer

experiences.name: Live a polar night
experiences.hint: A day the sun never rises; polar winter

experiences.name: Meet Santa Claus in Lapland
experiences.hint: Rovaniemi, Finland; the Santa Claus Village

experiences.name: Stand in a total solar eclipse
Cross the international date line
experiences.hint: Lose or gain a whole day

experiences.name: Go on a wildlife safari
experiences.hint: See big wildlife in its own habitat

experiences.name: Snorkel or dive a coral reef
Watch whales at sea
experiences.hint: From a boat or the shore

experiences.name: Fly in a hot air balloon
Look into an active volcano
experiences.hint: A glowing crater or fresh lava field

experiences.name: Bathe in a natural hot spring
Sleep a night in the desert
experiences.hint: Dunes and a sky full of stars

experiences.name: See the Milky Way with bare eyes
Stand above 4,000 m
experiences.hint: A high summit or pass, on your own feet or not

experiences.name: Ride a legendary long-distance train
experiences.hint: Trans-Siberian, the Ghan, a night train across a continent

experiences.name: Sail out of sight of land
Catch cherry blossom season
experiences.hint: Hanami in Japan, or any full bloom

experiences.name: Celebrate New Year in another country
Join a big traditional festival
experiences.hint: Diwali, Songkran, Día de Muertos, a lantern night
